The '''Lizling''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]] that were known for their diminutive size. One individual was named [[Boz (Lizling)|Boz]].

{{Species-stub}}
